_note: LT16 validates formula-owned HP credit, MP debit, and MP credit in the successful DCL apply callback. Cure (ability 1) and Chakra (106) are forced to HP credit 111; Chakra is also forced to MP credit 22; Rend MP (142) is forced to MP debit 33. Every other action preserves all native staged channels. Use whichever of these abilities exists on save 05; do not add hit control in this slice.
